title: The Correction That Arrives Too Late
public_summary: A bounded inquiry into what remains operative after a public claim is corrected.
shared_problem: What remains operative after a public claim has been corrected across research records, interfaces, memory and experience?
why_multiple_practices: The inquiry requires empirical observation, artistic problem construction and material or experiential testing that no single participating practice can supply without collapsing their differences.
stop_conditions: No non-trivial correction trace can be established.
All artistic outputs remain explanatory illustrations.
Rights or affected-public conditions cannot be resolved within the mandate.
rights_summary: Source versions and display rights must be verified before activation.
affected_public_summary: No public participant research in the first pilot without a separate exception.
